title: ROI Calculator

meta_description: Calculate Return on Investment automatically. Evaluate business decisions, investments, and more seamlessly.

hero.title: ROI Calculator
hero.subtitle: Make informed financial decisions. Calculate the percentage return on your initial investment efficiently.

formula: ROI = [(Ending Value - Initial Value) / Initial Value] * 100%
formula_explanation: ROI effectively measures the simple ratio of your net profit to your total initial investment cost, yielding a universally understood percentage.
example: Spending $5,000 on a marketing campaign that yields $6,500 in new sales creates a net profit of $1,500, delivering a solid 30% ROI.

faq.question: What is a good ROI?
faq.answer: It varies vastly by industry and risk tolerance. Typically, an annualized ROI of 7% to 10% is considered good for standard market investments.

faq.question: What is considered a good ROI?
faq.answer: It depends completely on the asset class and risk. For broad stock market indexes (like the S&P 500), an annualized ROI of 7-10% is historically standard.

faq.question: Does ROI take time into account?
faq.answer: Basic ROI does not. A 50% ROI could take 1 month or 10 years. To account for time, you must calculate the Annualized ROI (often called CAGR).
